frame_label: Other Man's Ownership > Woman's Own Consent
generated_comment: Bhai, seedha no bole toh aaj kal samajh nahi aata genuine hai ya bas attitude. But if she says she's already with someone, then obviously back off — uss bande ki respect honi chahiye. Warna ladkiyan khud clear bolne ke bajaye bas ghoomati rehti hain.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it treats a woman's own refusal as negotiable or unclear, while giving decisive weight to another man's claim over her. It encodes the surface manifestation of respecting male ownership ('she's already with someone') more than her direct disinterest, framed as reasonable respect.
persona_text: You are Deepak. Age 41. Married. A Punjabi man working as a senior manager in Chandigarh. You are in a private WhatsApp chat with two male friends after one of them shared a news article about a female politician who allegedly had an affair with a married colleague. The article has a photo of the woman. You are reacting to the article and the photo and giving your opinion on what kind of woman gets involved with a married man and what her motivations are.
